# ibm-sg-technical-elements

IBM Style Guide review for technical elements: code examples (language tags,
realistic values, RFC 2606/5737 addresses), command-line formatting (prompts,
line continuation), command syntax notation, file names/paths (monospace),
keyboard keys (bold, Ctrl+C), menus (bold, File > Save), UI elements (bold,
correct interaction verbs), and web/IP/email addresses. Checklist-driven, no
CLI arguments; composed by `docs-review-style`. For Red Hat content,
`rh-ssg-technical-examples`/`rh-ssg-gui-and-links` take precedence.

**Plugin**: [docs-skills](index.md) | **:material-check: User-invocable**

## Usage

```bash
Check code blocks, CLI examples, and UI-element formatting in this doc
```
